task_completion.description: The CT scan is loaded in 3D Slicer and displayed with high-contrast settings suitable for bone visualization (Bone Window).
task_completion.visual_evidence: 3D Slicer interface showing a CT scan where bones appear bright white and soft tissue is dark (high contrast).

task_completion.description: A circular Region of Interest (ROI) is placed within the trabecular bone of a vertebral body on an axial slice, clearly avoiding the cortical rim (edges).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Axial view of a vertebra showing a circular annotation (markup or segmentation) centered in the spongy interior bone, not touching the dense white outer ring.

task_completion.description: The Slicer interface displays a statistics panel (e.g., Markups or Segment Statistics) showing the Mean HU and Area for the placed ROI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A panel or table in Slicer showing values for 'Mean' (Hounsfield Units) and 'Area' (mm²). Area should be approx 80-150 mm².

task_completion.description: The generated JSON report is visible and contains a classification that logically matches the measured Mean HU value based on the task thresholds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal showing 'bone_density_report.json'. The 'classification' field must match 'mean_hu': >160 is 'Normal', 110-160 is 'Osteopenia', <110 is 'Osteoporosis'.

task_completion.description: The ROI file and the report file are saved in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer or terminal listing showing 'bone_density_roi.seg.nrrd' (or .mrk.json) and 'bone_density_report.json' in ~/Documents/SlicerData/LIDC/.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the 3D Slicer Graphical User Interface (GUI) to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the full 3D Slicer application window, toolbars, and active viewports, not just a terminal script.

integrity.description: The agent used the manual annotation tools (Markups or Segmentation) rather than purely programmatic generation without visualization.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Markups' module or 'Segment Editor' module is active or visible in the sidebar during the process.

integrity.description: The values in the final report match the values observed in the Slicer GUI statistics panel.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'mean_hu' in the JSON report corresponds to the Mean value visible in the Slicer statistics panel in previous or current screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Bone density thresholds: Normal > 160 HU, Osteopenia 110-160 HU, Osteoporosis < 110 HU. Minimum ROI area: 80 mm². Target levels: T12 or L1. ROI must be in trabecular bone (center), avoiding cortical edges.
